summary: Build an AI system that can read court judgment PDFs, extract key information, generate a structured action plan, and ensure human-verified data is presented in a dashboard for government use. Constraints include handling complex, inconsistent legal PDFs, ensuring outputs are explainable and verifiable, and focusing on decision support, not full automation.
optimization_claims: Two-pass validation reduces cost by up to 90%
constraints_addressed: Must handle complex, inconsistent legal PDFs
Outputs must be explainable and verifiable
Focus on decision support, not full automation
